claim: Rare transitions are not automatically valuable
implication: Keep separate rare and value gates and report rare-only ablations

claim: Zero or low immediate reward is not corrupted data
implication: Do not filter traffic samples solely by zero reward

claim: Traffic reward proxies can be fragile and must be tied to real metrics
implication: Rank final controllers by travel queue delay throughput reward not artifact status

claim: Strong TSC baselines must include max-pressure and learned multi-agent methods
implication: Compare against MaxPressure PressLight CoLight FRAP-style families where available

claim: Simulator and sensing assumptions affect reported TSC performance
implication: Group results by city network simulator and observation set

claim: Offline TSC is motivated by safety and interaction cost
implication: Emphasize replay reuse and data efficiency rather than unsafe online exploration

claim: Offline-to-online TSC is an active frontier
implication: Position R2V-Traffic near data-efficient adaptation work

claim: Generative replay can improve RL data efficiency but is not traffic admission proof
implication: Use diffusion as proposal source and let gates decide admission

claim: Support and OOD control are central in offline RL
implication: Keep support and dynamics gates mandatory in main path

claim: Safety and robustness are distinct from efficiency
implication: Report safety/integrity separately from travel time when available

claim: Heterogeneous behavior policies matter in offline MARL TSC
implication: Record behavior source or policy_id and use behavior-aware splits

claim: Traffic status artifacts are not performance metrics
implication: Keep artifact validation completion status and traffic metrics in separate tables

claim: Proxy smoke artifacts are not paper diffusion evidence
implication: Require real paper-eligible diffusion score or repair artifacts for final claims

claim: R2V weights affect offline replay or pair sampling rather than PPO rollout storage
implication: Do not claim PPO Bellman or GAE target changes from R2V weighted JSONL artifacts
